Powering Your Future with a Caribbean Citizenship

Dominica Citizenship by Investment Program

One of the Caribbean’s most economical routes: invest from USD 200,000 and pursue a respected second citizenship pathway.

Since 1993, Dominica’s CBI framework has become known for affordability, efficiency, and global mobility potential. The program supports individuals and families seeking long-term security, flexibility, and international access.

Typical processing: around 6 months

Speak with an expertGet Quote

Key Benefits

  • •Competitive entry threshold
  • •Dual citizenship generally permitted
  • •Consistent demand among global investors

Investment Routes

  • •Economic Diversification Fund contribution (starting from USD 200,000)
  • •Approved real estate route (starting from USD 200,000)

Eligibility & Investment Options

The main applicant should be at least 18 years old, pass due diligence, and select one approved route.

Economic Diversification Fund (EDF) Contribution

USD 200,000 (single applicant) / USD 250,000 (family of four)

A non-refundable government contribution and the most affordable entry route into Dominica citizenship.

Additional government fees vary by family size, dependent ages, and selected route.

Government-Approved Real Estate Investment

Minimum: USD 200,000

Invest in approved Caribbean real estate and combine citizenship eligibility with a tangible asset.

Typical minimum holding period: 3 years before resale (conditions apply).

Family-Focused Structuring

Flexible planning based on applicant profile

Program structure can be tailored for individuals and families with dependent-related fee considerations.

Our team can provide a personalized quote based on your exact family composition.

Application Process

Our team delivers a secure and confidential end-to-end process.

  1. Initial consultation and pre-screening of eligibility and objectives
  2. Document preparation, submission, fees, and due diligence checks
  3. Approval in principle and completion of investment/contribution
  4. Certificate of Naturalization and passport issuance

Estimated timeline: around 8–10 months

Unlock Your Future with Dominica Citizenship

Gain stronger global mobility, tax planning flexibility, and long-term security through a trusted Caribbean CBI program.

Speak with an expert

Frequently Asked Questions: Dominica Citizenship by Investment

  • • What is the Dominica Citizenship by Investment Program?
  • • How long does it take to obtain Dominica citizenship?
  • • Is Dominica citizenship permanent?
  • • Who can be included in the citizenship application?
  • • Is travel or residence in Dominica required to apply?
  • • Is Dominica a safe country to invest in?
  • • How strong is the Dominica passport for visa-free travel?
  • • How can professional advisory support help with my application?

Note: Program rules and thresholds can change by official government updates.
